name: Leadership
description: Leaders allow their squad to fire upon targets not normally available (troop roll required). Units within 8" of leader can be rallied if army breaks. +1 bonus to squad troop rolls. At least 1 leader per army MUST be chosen.
special: Up to 1 per squad. Max 1 leader per squad.

name: Sniper
description: Specialises in killing at long range with a high powered rifle. When deployed, can pick off enemy leaders and support troops, gets enhanced fire and concealment bonuses. ONLY snipers may use sniper laser, sniper rifle, and heavy sniper rifle.
special: Maximum 3 snipers per army. Required for SL, SNR, HSR weapons.

name: Sapper
description: Military engineer. May use demolition charges, lay minefields, deactivate booby traps, and destroy enemy defense systems. +2 to demolition dice rolls.
special: No maximum number. Required for demolition packs.

name: Grenadier
description: +2 bonus to hit with thrown grenades. +1 bonus when checking if troops in cover are injured by grenades. +1 bonus in hand to hand combat.
special: No maximum. Any number may be fielded.

name: Medic
description: May attempt to heal one fallen comrade per turn (roll 4+ on 1d6, must move to within 6" of casualty). Medics do not count toward morale loss if killed.
special: Maximum 3 medics per army. Includes medical equipment. Medics killed do not reduce morale.

name: Fanatic
description: Morale rules do not apply. Fanatic troops do not retreat even when army is broken. If not fired upon last fire phase and no leader nearby, must advance toward nearest enemy.
special: Available to robots, droids, and certain alien/rebel troops.

name: Gunner
description: Allows trooper to fire tripod mounted light artillery and weapons from the heavy weapons list without penalty. Unskilled troops fire at -2 hit penalty.
special: NOT required to fire squad support weapons.

name: Scout
description: Extra training in jet pack jumping (+3" jump distance, -1 accident roll), laser painting, and concealment. Concealment range is reduced (shown in brackets on cover chart).
special: Up to 2 squads of scouts may be fielded per army.

name: Swordsman
description: Trained in martial arts and advanced hand to hand combat weapons like force swords and power axes. Adds +4 to 1d10 roll in hand to hand combat. Some melee weapons may ONLY be used by figures with swordsman skill.
special: Required for Light Sword and Heavy Power Axe (Thuntra).

name: Dodge
description: Figure is exceptionally quick and evasive. Once per fire phase, when targeted, the figure may attempt a dodge — attacker suffers a -1 penalty to hit. Particularly effective in close terrain.
special: ERA supplement skill. Usable by Heroes and Veterans.

name: Nerves of Steel
description: The figure is utterly unshaken by enemy fire and casualties nearby. Not affected by morale tests caused by nearby kills or suppression. May attempt to rally broken troops within 8" even when not a leader.
special: ERA supplement skill. Abbreviated 'NOS' on troop lists.

name: Ambidextrous
description: May fire two weapons in the same fire phase. The second weapon fires at -1 to hit. Both weapons must be pistol-class or one-handed.
special: ERA supplement skill. Commonly found on Heroes and elite troops.

name: Constitution
description: Figure has exceptional physical resilience. When a GH (Glancing Hit) result is received, roll 1d6: on a 4+ the hit is downgraded to No Effect. Does not apply against TOTAL damage types.
special: ERA supplement skill. Stacks with Digimedic equipment.

name: Fortune
description: This figure seems to have luck on their side. Once per turn, may re-roll any single dice roll that directly affects this figure (to-hit, damage, morale, etc.). The second result stands.
special: ERA supplement skill. Typically found on Heroes and named characters.

name: Quick Fire
description: Figure can fire rapidly with exceptional speed. May fire twice at the same or different targets in a single fire phase, but both shots are at -2 to hit. Only applies to personal infantry weapons.
special: ERA supplement skill. Common on Hero-class figures.

name: Gun Skill
description: +1 to hit with a specific weapon type (noted in brackets on the troop entry, e.g. 'Gun skill (Ramjet)'). Applies to all range bands for that weapon class.
special: ERA supplement skill. The specific weapon type is listed in the troop profile.

name: Aggressive
description: +2 bonus in hand to hand combat dice rolls. If not suppressed or pinned and no orders are received, the figure will advance toward the nearest enemy each move phase.
special: ERA supplement skill. Similar to Fanatic but does not override morale rules.

name: Initiative
description: Figure may act in either player's activation phase once per turn without waiting for orders. +2 bonus to all initiative and reaction rolls. May fire or move out of sequence.
special: ERA supplement skill. Powerful individual advantage for Hero-class figures.
